quick_actions.name: 📋 Working Memory
quick_actions.sql: SELECT * FROM pcde_working_memory ORDER BY created_at DESC

quick_actions.name: 🧠 AI Learnings
quick_actions.sql: SELECT * FROM pcde_ai_memory ORDER BY confidence DESC

quick_actions.name: 📚 All Procedures
quick_actions.sql: SELECT procedure_id, procedure_name, domain FROM pcde_procedure_registry ORDER BY procedure_id

quick_actions.name: ❌ Recent Failures
quick_actions.sql: SELECT * FROM pcde_procedure_failure ORDER BY last_error_at DESC LIMIT 10
